_note: WHYPE (Wrapped HYPE, HyperEVM chain 999) is a WETH9 fork. deposit() wraps native HYPE -> WHYPE; the wrapped amount is msg.value. Decoded to token::wrap_native (token.key.address = the WHYPE contract = $to; amount = $tx.value). The WrapNative/UnwrapNative TokenActions now exist (added in the WETH wrap-action work), so HYPE wrapping is structurally legible — a policy can scope on the wrapped amount instead of seeing an anonymous Unknown call. WHYPE address 0x5555555555555555555555555555555555555555 is 1차-confirmed (HyperLiquid docs 'Wrapped HYPE').
